title: Vision & Mission
seoDescription: The vision and mission of the Centre for Plant Medicine Research — national leadership in plant-based medicine science, services, and public value.
lede: Our direction and purpose as Ghana's centre of excellence for plant medicine research.

vision.title: Vision
paragraphs: A Ghana where plant-based medicine is understood through rigorous science, practised with quality and safety, and valued as a sustainable contribution to national health and wellbeing.

mission.title: Mission
paragraphs: To advance research, technical services, and education on medicinal plants; to support regulation and industry with evidence-based analysis; and to translate knowledge responsibly for clinicians, communities, and policymakers.
